---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or issue
title: '[BUG] '
labels: 'bug'
assignees: ''

---

## Bug Description

**Summary:**
(Clear, one-sentence description of the bug)

**Expected Behavior:**
(What should happen?)

**Actual Behavior:**
(What actually happens?)

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Environment

**Platform:**
- [ ] iOS (Simulator/Device, iOS version)
- [ ] Android (Emulator/Device, Android version)
- [ ] Web (Browser, OS)

**App Version:**
(Git commit hash or release version)

**Device Details:**
- Device: (e.g., iPhone 15 Pro, Pixel 8)
- OS Version: (e.g., iOS 17.2, Android 14)
- App Build: (e.g., develop branch commit abc1234)

## Screenshots/Videos

(Attach screenshots, screen recordings, or GIFs showing the bug)

## Logs/Error Messages

```
(Paste relevant console logs, error messages, or stack traces)
```

## Impact

**Severity:**
- [ ] Critical (app crashes, data loss, security issue)
- [ ] High (major feature broken, blocks users)
- [ ] Medium (feature partially broken, workaround exists)
- [ ] Low (cosmetic issue, minor inconvenience)

**Affected Users:**
- [ ] All users
- [ ] Free users only
- [ ] Premium users only
- [ ] Specific user types (teachers/students/admins)

## Possible Cause

(If you have insights into what might be causing this)

## Suggested Fix

(If you have ideas for how to fix it)

## Related Issues

- Related to #X
- Duplicate of #Y
